name: Genesis Protect Acute Claim Evidence
description: Evidence bundle and operator-attested review schema for Genesis Protect Acute claim handling across Event 7 and Travel 30.

requiredFacts.label: Incident window
requiredFacts.description: Date and time of the acute event inside the purchased coverage window.

requiredFacts.label: Care location
requiredFacts.description: Facility name, city, country, and proof that care happened in the covered travel context.

requiredFacts.label: Clinical summary
requiredFacts.description: Doctor note, discharge summary, or equivalent record showing acute emergency treatment.

requiredFacts.label: Billing proof
requiredFacts.description: Itemized invoice or bill plus proof of payment when reimbursement review is required.

decisionStates.label: Hold
decisionStates.description: Insufficient confidence, missing evidence, or exclusion review still pending.

decisionStates.label: Approve
decisionStates.description: Operator-backed oracle review approved the claim and set the reserve amount.

decisionStates.label: Deny
decisionStates.description: Claim failed waiting-period, exclusion, fraud, or evidence requirements.

decisionStates.label: Dispute
decisionStates.description: Operator escalation or dispute review is active before final settlement.

supportingFields.label: Benefit tier
supportingFields.description: Tier 1, Tier 2, or Tier 3 fixed-benefit classification.

supportingFields.label: Reimbursement top-up
supportingFields.description: Travel 30 only. Actual acute emergency spend above the fixed tier benefit, capped at the aggregate maximum.

supportingFields.label: Decision support hash
supportingFields.description: Hash commitment to the operator review packet or internal recommendation bundle.
